content.text: Any developer on a paid Claude plan can build a
by implementing an MCP server and providing its URL to Claude.
Under the hood, a custom connector is just an MCP server that:
Runs either locally (for desktop) or remotely (for teams).
Implements security and permission logic appropriate for your environment.
You can then add it in Claude by entering the MCP server URL in the “Add custom connector” flow, making your internal API or system
This is the path to integrating Claude with internal systems (legacy apps, private APIs, internal services) without exposing them publicly.
